title: Kadhala Kadhala Lyrics Sathuranga Vettai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song : Kadhala Kadhala
Singer(s): Kalyani Nair
Movie: Sathuranga Vettai
Music: Sean Roldan

Kadhala Kadhala
ayyoo idha enna solla.
Kaattrile kelvigal
yaarthan vidai kandu solla.

Manase marikka ada yedhu maaraappu.
Manasa thorandhaa
vandhu serum pollaappu.azhage..

Kannellaam un kaatchi
kadhellaam un pechu
ida maara thottramaagane.

Munmaarbil thee moottam
nadu mudhugil kuttraaalam
oru pozhudhil rendu kaalaamey.

Azhaigal pesum oru
kadalin saarbaaga.
Vizhigal pesum adaenadhu saarbaaga
Uyire..

Uchchi malai paaraiyile
unpeyarau koovinen.
Meendum varum edhir oliyil
en peyarai kettinen.

Vinnilavin vilumbugalai
ingirundhe thodugiren.
Penaruge avan irundhum
kai nadungi vidugiren.

Oh kolla kollayaai
ennodu kadhal ulladhu
kollai kadhalil konjamaai
kaamam ulladhu..urave..

Kadhala Kadhala
ayyoo idha enna solla.
Kaattrile kelvigal
yaarthan vidai kandu solla.

Manase marikka ada yedhu maaraappu.
Manasa thorandhaa
vandhu serum pollaappu.azhage..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhala Kadhala?

The song explores themes of love and longing, capturing the emotional turmoil of the heart.

Who composed the music for Sathuranga Vettai?

The music for Sathuranga Vettai was composed by Sean Roldan.

Who is the singer of Kadhala Kadhala?

The song is sung by Kalyani Nair.

What is the release year of Sathuranga Vettai?

The movie Sathuranga Vettai was released in 2014.

What emotions does Kadhala Kadhala evoke?

The song evokes emotions of romance and melancholy, creating a soothing yet poignant experience.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kadhala Kadhala is a soulful melody from the movie Sathuranga Vettai, capturing the essence of love and longing. Sung by Kalyani Nair, the song's soothing tune and heartfelt lyrics convey the emotional turmoil of unspoken feelings. Sean Roldan's composition enhances the melancholic yet romantic mood, making it perfect for moments of introspection. The song beautifully portrays the complexities of love, leaving a lasting impact on the listener.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kadhala Kadhala from the movie Sathuranga Vettai is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by Kalyani Nair and composed by Sean Roldan, this song weaves a soothing yet melancholic atmosphere. Dive into the soulful experience of this track that stands out with its heartfelt lyrics and enchanting music.
stanzaMeanings: Oh love, oh love, what can I say about this? In the wind, who will find the answers and tell them?
Oh heart, what can change and make you forget? If you open your heart, trouble will come.
In my eyes, I see only you. In my ears, I hear only your words. Is this a change?
A spark on my chest, a waterfall on my back, in a moment, both things happen.
The waves of the sea speak like a message. My eyes speak as if they are my message, oh life.
On the mountain peak, I called your name. In the echo that came back, I heard my name.
From here, I reach out to touch the moon's rays. Even when he is near, my hands tremble and let go.
Oh, like a thief, my love is with me. In this stolen love, there is a little desire, oh dear.
Oh love, oh love, what can I say about this? In the wind, who will find the answers and tell them?
Oh heart, what can change and make you forget? If you open your heart, trouble will come.
